title: Measure and improve the performance of urban forests
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Measure and improve the performance of urban forests demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Research urban forest practices and applications

pcs.text: Research urban forest case studies and management reports
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Research urban forest case studies and management reports?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Research urban forest case studies and management reports.

pcs.text: Review best management practices in urban forest planning and management
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review best management practices in urban forest planning and management?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review best management practices in urban forest planning and management.

pcs.text: Research applications and functional tools for measuring benefits of urban forests
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Research applications and functional tools for measuring benefits of urban forests?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Research applications and functional tools for measuring benefits of urban forests.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Research urban forest practices and applications

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document evidence-based research into a preliminary report on benefits of urban forests.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify base financial value for functional benefit.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Calculate financial values of functional and environmental benefits of current tree population.

pcs.text: Determine benefits of heat island modification of urban areas
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine benefits of heat island modification of urban areas?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine benefits of heat island modification of urban areas.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document a preliminary report on total asset valuation of an urban forest.
